mapper.sql: id, tenant_code, tenant_name, description, table_prefix, admin_user, admin_email, admin_phone, status, is_system, expired_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_tenant WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_tenant WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_tenant (tenant_code, tenant_name, description, table_prefix, admin_user, admin_email, admin_phone, status, is_system, expired_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{tenantCode}, #{tenantName}, #{description}, #{tablePrefix}, #{adminUser}, #{adminEmail}, #{adminPhone}, #{status}, #{isSystem}, #{expiredAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_tenant
tenant_name = #{tenantName}, description = #{description}, table_prefix = #{tablePrefix}, admin_user = #{adminUser}, admin_email = #{adminEmail}, admin_phone = #{adminPhone}, status = #{status}, expired_at = #{expiredAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_tenant SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
